companies.name: Vero Networks
companies.discovery_notes: JAM-owned (Andy 196669355). 11 HubSpot contacts on file. M&A: TEC acquisition CLOSED 2026-04-15 (10 days ago, southeast expansion MS/AL/TN); BendTel acquisition closed 2025-12-01 (Bend OR); $500M strategic investment 2026-02-23 from Hamilton Lane / Braemont Capital / Delta-v Capital for FTTP & wholesale fiber expansion + ongoing M&A. ZoomInfo scoops: heavy OSP/fiber engineering hiring (5+ open roles since Nov 2025 in Engineering & Technical, all-time high). Ukiah CA $5.6M CPUC partnership Oct 2025. 6 candidates added (4 strong fit, 2 active-sequence-filter conditionals). Skipped: Gregg Strumberger (Legal), Chad Wertz (Wireless SVP), Zach Nebergall (Product/Strategy), Pamela Moore (COO too senior/ops), Greg Friedman (CFO).
